feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Hangman's Trick // J. Todd
entry.summary:
Author: themoonunderstandsmyneeds

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,799Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 51

Summary: They were the best of friends, the girl and the boy from the slums. Hunched over books together in the library, vicious games of uno, movies and popcorn on the couch, tending to each other's scrapes and cuts, sleepovers, nights on the rooftops of Gotham, two children playing at being heroes. They never knew what awaited them, the horrors and traumas that were just a breath away. They haven't seen each other in over seven years, he's supposed to be dead, she's supposed to have moved on. But, nothing is the way it's supposed to be.   ( A/N: not the best summary but you get the point lol. don't expect this to be a comic accurate story. i will do my best to keep characters how they are represented in their media but i'm not holding myself to any particular story line. consider this an AU if you will. please check TW's. i will put chapter specific ones in the notes at the start of every chapter but for the first chapter i will try and cover all the potential triggers this story will cover. anyways, essentially this is a story where you are jason's childhood best friend, who isn't aware that he is alive. don't expect everything to make perfect sense, we will gain more backstory as we progress. enjoy xx.)

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,536Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

entry.title: My Fists
entry.summary:
Author: d0tc0m

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,200Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: You wear glow-stick bracelets on your wrists and one always glows brighter than the rest, you sit on a different block every day right at sunset. You keep him on edge, make him search for you with blood on his hands and repentance throbbing in his skull. Repentance disguised as a fist aimed at his brains. You disappear, and his first instinct will be to look for you. OR angel! reader, but not in the traditional sense. You smoke on rooftops, wear your halo around your wrist, pretend that the clouds don't part above your head, and spend your luck on a vigilante with more sin and holiness in his soul than you can account for. It's hard not to fall for him when he keeps looking for you without an incentive.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Still Him, Somehow
entry.summary:
Author: Oxylli

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,810Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Losing her childhood best friend was the worst thing that was ever to happen to Melia, she thinks, running a simple life full of trouble and piles of books to run away from her lonely past and move on from Jason. Just as life starts making sense again, the new and most annnoying red-headed vigilante decides to take his claim over the streets of Gotham. To say she hates him is an understatement. Unbeknownst to her, the new vigilante is exactly the person she's needed for all these years she had lost him. Him on the other hand is hellbent on making sure she never finds out how far the two of them actually go back. Unfortunately for both of them, the universe decides its been long enough that they've been apart, and does everything in its power to force them back together.

entry.title: Last Bullet, Last Breath
entry.summary:
Author: Kmslli

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,709Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Gotham is dangerous, corrupt, and survival here is a brutal challenge. No one knows this better than those from Gotham's forgotten corners. To survive, you either have to be filthy rich or a master of the art of survival. But there is a place even more dangerous than Gotham, a place where living is nearly impossible: Zaun. A place where Gotham citizens would never dare to set foot.

entry.title: Title of your Sex Tape
entry.summary:
Author: miryum

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,677Chapters: 23/23Kudos: 726

Summary: And then there was one. Y/n L/n. Dick sighed heavily, preparing himself for the shenanigans she would surely have gotten herself into. Dick’s gaze swept to the desk opposite Jason’s but… Y/n was sitting in her seat, cataloguing evidence. Dick’s mouth fell open. It was a miracle!  Detective!Jason Todd x detective!Reader based on Jake and Amy's relationship

entry.title: Attention
entry.summary:
Author: LicoricexWitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,150Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 216

Summary: You've always been obsessed with superheroes, ever since you were a little kid. You moved to Gotham all alone with stars in your eyes for undergrad before the cold reality of city-living set in. The streets were mean and people weren't as kind as they were back home. It was hard to make friends and you preferred to stay inside, making you even lonelier. You were a regular fish out of water, not a lot of close friends or family, living all alone--the perfect target for someone with not-so-nice intentions. They always said not to meet your heroes because they could never live up to your expectations. Or sometimes, they weren't a hero at all.
